items.text: 传感器自带的M4内六角螺丝

regions.content:
1. 正面测力面安装孔为6个M4的螺纹孔，深度6mm；正面的定位销孔是2个⌀5▽6；
  2. 传感器自带6个M4内六角圆柱头螺丝，正面安装，螺丝最长可伸出的长度是6mm；
  3. 背面安装面的定位销孔是2个⌀5▽4。
regions.content_en:
1. 6M4，6mm；2⌀5▽6；
  2. The sensor comes with 6 M4 hexagon socket head cap screws, front installation, maximum screw protruding length is 6mm.
  3. 背面安装面的定位销孔是2个⌀5▽4。

labels.label_text_original: 1.正面测力面安装孔为6个M4的螺纹孔，深度6mm；
labels.translation_en_simple: 1. Front force surface: 6 x M4 threaded holes, depth 6mm
labels.translation_en_full: 1. The mounting holes on the front force-measuring surface are 6 M4 threaded holes with a depth of 6mm

labels.translation_en_simple: 2 x ⌀5 depth 6 locating pin holes on front
labels.translation_en_full: The front locating pin holes are 2 x ⌀5 with a depth of 6

labels.label_text_original: 2.传感器自带6个M4内六角圆柱头螺丝，正面安装，
labels.translation_en_simple: 2. Sensor includes 6 M4 hex socket cap screws, front mounting
labels.translation_en_full: 2. The sensor comes with 6 M4 hex socket cap screws for front mounting

labels.label_text_original: 螺丝最长可伸出的长度是6mm；
labels.translation_en_full: The maximum extension length of the screws is 6mm

labels.label_text_original: 3.背面安装面的定位销孔是2个⌀5▽4。
labels.translation_en_simple: 3. Back mounting surface: 2 x ⌀5 depth 4 locating pin holes
labels.translation_en_full: 3. The locating pin holes on the back mounting surface are 2 x ⌀5 with a depth of 4

items.text: 1.正面测力面安装孔为6个M4的螺纹孔，深度6mm;
正面的定位销孔是2个の56;
2.传感器自带6个M4内六角圆柱头螺丝，正面安装，
螺丝最长可伸出的长度是6mm;
3.背面安装面的定位销孔是2个Q54。
